jobs.title: Responsabile Laboratorio di Collezione Abbigliamento Lifestyle Uomo

titleByLocale.en: Responsable Laboratory for Men's Lifestyle Clothing Collection
titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Laboratorio di Collezione Abbigliamento Lifestyle Uomo
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable du Laboratoire pour la Collection de Vêtements de Mode Homme Lifestyle

jobs.description:
Fondato nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada si è costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in oltre 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Church's e Car Shoe, e conta dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. 

 
 

 
 

 SCOPO 

 
 La figura ricercata ha una forte sensibilità al prodotto e un background tecnico in area Abbigliamento di lusso con comprovata esperienza su capospalla tecnico. All’interno della Divisione Prada Uomo Lifestyle, sarà responsabile della gestione della catena produttiva relativa al capospalla sportswear, supervisionando attività e flussi operativi di circa 60 persone. Il ruolo prevede il coordinamento della catena nelle fasi di prototipia, campionario e produzione, garantendo efficienza, qualità e allineamento con le esigenze stilistiche e industriali del Gruppo. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSABILITÀ 

 
 

 
 

• Gestione e coordinamento del personale (circa 60 persone) e organizzazione della catena e del flusso di lavoro per far fronte alle diverse esigenze (sfilate, prototipia, campionario, produzione, pubblicità). 
 

• Gestione dei rapporti e delle informazioni con gli uffici e i reparti strettamente collegati (Ufficio Prodotto, Modelleria, Cad, Produzione, Controllo qualità ) 
 

• Risoluzione di criticità tecniche che possono intervenire nello sviluppo di un capo 
 

• Sviluppare reportistiche relative allo stato di avanzamento di una collezione. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 REQUISITI E CONOSCENZE 

 
 

 
 Ottima conoscenza tecnica del capospalla uomo sportswear di lusso, realizzato in nylon e tessuti tecnici 

 
 10-15 anni di esperienza nel ruolo di Responsabile Laboratorio e/o Ispettore Tecnico Laboratori esterni 

 
 Buona conoscenza delle macchine da cucire e capacità di utilizzo delle stesse 

 
 Autonomia nell’utilizzo di Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint) 

 
 Capacità di Gestione del personale e distribuzione e monitoraggio del lavoro all’interno del team 

 
 Capacità di sviluppare reportistica relativa a stato avanzamento di collezione. 

 
 Aver ottenuto un attestato di frequenza ad un corso specifico in ambito abbigliamento verrà considerato un plus. 

 
 Cura del dettaglio, flessibilità e sensibilità al prodotto 

 

 
 

 
 Entrare a far parte della nostra Azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che diamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, favorendone la crescita professionale. 
 Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità a tutti i candidati, indipendentemente da genere, etnia, orientamento sessuale, disabilità, o altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un ambiente di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti.

descriptionByLocale.en:
Description

Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in luxury, operates in over 45 countries with the brands PRADA, Miu Miu, Church's and Car Shoe, and employs over 100 nationalities.

SCOPE

The researched figure has a strong sensitivity to the product and a technical background in the area Luxury Clothing with proven experience on technical outerwear. Within the Prada Men Lifestyle Division, he will be responsible for managing the production chain related to sportswear, overseeing activities and operating flows of about 60 people. The role involves the coordination of the chain in the stages of prototyping, sampling and production, ensuring efficiency, quality and alignment with the Group's stylistic and industrial needs.

RESPONSIBILITY

- Management and coordination of personnel (approximately 60 people) and organization of the chain and workflow to meet the different needs (swimming, prototyping, sampling, production, advertising).
- Management of relations and information with the offices and departments closely linked (Product Office, Modelling, Cad, Production, Quality Control)
- Resolution of technical criticalities that can intervene in the development of a leader
- Develop reports about the progress of a collection.

REQUIREMENTS

- Excellent technical knowledge of luxury sportswear men's outerwear, made of nylon and technical fabrics
- 10-15 years of experience in the role of Laboratory Manager and/or External Technical Inspectorate
- Good knowledge of sewing machines and the ability to use them
- Autonomy in using Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint)
- Personnel management skills and job distribution and monitoring within the team
- Ability to develop reporting related to state of collection advancement.
- Aver obtained a frequency certificate at a specific course in clothing will be considered a plus.
- Retail care, flexibility and product sensitivity

What we offer

- Joining our company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the pursuit of excellence.
- The engine of our success is the importance and value we give to the talent and passion of our people, encouraging their professional growth.
- The Prada Group promotes an inclusive working environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics.
We believe diversity is a value and we are committed to building a fair and respectful working environment for all.

Descrizione

Fondato nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada si è costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in oltre 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Church's e Car Shoe, e conta dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità.

SCOPO

La figura ricercata ha una forte sensibilità al prodotto e un background tecnico in area Abbigliamento di lusso con comprovata esperienza su capospalla tecnico. All’interno della Divisione Prada Uomo Lifestyle, sarà responsabile della gestione della catena produttiva relativa al capospalla sportswear, supervisionando attività e flussi operativi di circa 60 persone. Il ruolo prevede il coordinamento della catena nelle fasi di prototipia, campionario e produzione, garantendo efficienza, qualità e allineamento con le esigenze stilistiche e industriali del Gruppo.

RESPONSABILITÀ

- Gestione e coordinamento del personale (circa 60 persone) e organizzazione della catena e del flusso di lavoro per far fronte alle diverse esigenze (sfilate, prototipia, campionario, produzione, pubblicità).
- Gestione dei rapporti e delle informazioni con gli uffici e i reparti strettamente collegati (Ufficio Prodotto, Modelleria, Cad, Produzione, Controllo qualità)
- Risoluzione di criticità tecniche che possono intervenire nello sviluppo di un capo
- Sviluppare reportistiche relative allo stato di avanzamento di una collezione.

REQUISITI E CONOSCENZE

- Ottima conoscenza tecnica del capospalla uomo sportswear di lusso, realizzato in nylon e tessuti tecnici
- 10-15 anni di esperienza nel ruolo di Responsabile Laboratorio e/o Ispettore Tecnico Laboratori esterni
- Buona conoscenza delle macchine da cucire e capacità di utilizzo delle stesse
- Autonomia nell’utilizzo di Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint)
- Capacità di Gestione del personale e distribuzione e monitoraggio del lavoro all’interno del team
- Capacità di sviluppare reportistica relativa a stato avanzamento di collezione.
- Aver ottenuto un attestato di frequenza ad un corso specifico in ambito abbigliamento verrà considerato un plus.
- Cura del dettaglio, flessibilità e sensibilità al prodotto

Cosa offriamo

- Entrare a far parte della nostra Azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza.
- Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che diamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, favorendone la crescita professionale.
- Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità a tutti i candidati, indipendentemente da genere, etnia, orientamento sessuale, disabilità, o altre caratteristiche personali.
- Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un ambiente di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Warenbezeichnung

Die 1913 in Italien gegründete Prada-Gruppe wurde auf einer Tradition der Exzellenz und mit einer Vision der Innovation aufgebaut. Mit den Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Church's und Car Shoe betreibt die Gruppe, ein weltweit führender Luxuskonzern, in über 45 Ländern und beschäftigt über 100 Nationalitäten.

ANWENDUNG

Die erforschte Figur hat eine starke Empfindlichkeit gegenüber dem Produkt und einen technischen Hintergrund im Bereich Luxuskleidung mit nachgewiesener Erfahrung auf technische Oberbekleidung. Innerhalb der Prada Men Lifestyle Division wird er für die Verwaltung der Produktionskette im Zusammenhang mit Sportbekleidung, Betreuung von Aktivitäten und Betriebsabläufen von etwa 60 Personen verantwortlich sein. Die Rolle ist die Koordination der Kette in den Stadien der Prototyping, Probenahme und Produktion, die Effizienz, Qualität und Ausrichtung mit dem stilistischen und industriellen Bedarf der Gruppe zu gewährleisten.

RESPONSIBILITÄT

- Management und Koordination des Personals (etwa 60 Personen) und Organisation der Kette und des Workflows, um die verschiedenen Bedürfnisse zu erfüllen (Schwimmen, Prototyping, Probenahmen, Produktion, Werbung).
- Management von Beziehungen und Informationen mit den Büros und Abteilungen eng verbunden (Produktbüro, Modellierung, Cad, Produktion, Qualitätskontrolle)
- Auflösung von technischen Kritiken, die in die Entwicklung eines Führers eingreifen können
- Erarbeiten Sie Berichte über den Fortschritt einer Sammlung.

ANFORDERUNGEN

- Ausgezeichnete technische Kenntnisse der Luxus-Sportbekleidung Herren Oberbekleidung, aus Nylon und technischen Stoffen
- 10-15 Jahre Erfahrung in der Rolle des Laborleiters und/oder externer technischer Inspektion
- Gute Kenntnisse der Nähmaschinen und die Fähigkeit, sie zu verwenden
- Autonomie bei der Verwendung von Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint)
- Personalmanagementfähigkeiten und Jobverteilung und -überwachung im Team
- Fähigkeit, Reporting im Zusammenhang mit dem Stand der Erhebung zu entwickeln.
- Aver erhält ein Frequenzzertifikat mit einem bestimmten Kurs in der Kleidung wird als Plus betrachtet.
- Einzelhandel, Flexibilität und Produktempfindlichkeit

Was wir bieten

- Unser Unternehmen zu begleiten bedeutet, in einem kreativen und internationalen Umfeld zu arbeiten, mit Teams von Menschen, die von Neugier und dem Streben nach Exzellenz motiviert sind.
- Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und Wert, die wir dem Talent und der Leidenschaft unserer Menschen geben und ihr berufliches Wachstum fördern.
- Die Prada Group fördert ein integratives Arbeitsumfeld und gewährleistet Chancengleichheit für alle Kandidaten, unabhängig von Geschlecht, ethnischer Herkunft, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen.
Wir glauben, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist, und wir sind verpflichtet, ein faires und respektvolles Arbeitsumfeld für alle aufzubauen.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Désignation des marchandises

Fondé en 1913 en Italie, le groupe Prada s'appuie sur une tradition d'excellence et une vision d'innovation. Le Groupe, leader mondial du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Church's et Car Shoe, et emploie plus de 100 nationalités.

PORTÉE

La figure étudiée a une forte sensibilité au produit et un arrière-plan technique dans le domaine Vêtements de luxe avec une expérience prouvée sur les vêtements extérieurs techniques. Au sein de la Division du style de vie de Prada Men, il sera chargé de gérer la chaîne de production liée aux vêtements de sport, de superviser les activités et les flux opérationnels d'une soixantaine de personnes. Ce rôle implique la coordination de la chaîne aux stades du prototypage, de l'échantillonnage et de la production, en assurant l'efficacité, la qualité et l'alignement avec les besoins stylistiques et industriels du Groupe.

RESPONSABILITÉ

- Gestion et coordination du personnel (environ 60 personnes) et organisation de la chaîne et du flux de travail pour répondre aux différents besoins (baignoire, prototypage, échantillonnage, production, publicité).
- Gestion des relations et des informations avec les bureaux et départements étroitement liés (Bureau des produits, Modélisation, Cad, Production, Contrôle de la qualité)
- Résolution des criticités techniques qui peuvent intervenir dans le développement d'un leader
- Élaborer des rapports sur l'état d'avancement d'une collection.

EXIGENCES

- Excellente connaissance technique des vêtements de sport de luxe pour hommes, en nylon et tissus techniques
- 10-15 ans d'expérience dans le rôle de directeur de laboratoire et/ou d'inspection technique externe
- Bonne connaissance des machines à coudre et aptitude à les utiliser
- Autonomie en utilisant Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint)
- Compétences en gestion du personnel et répartition et suivi des emplois au sein de l'équipe
- Capacité d'élaborer des rapports sur l'avancement de la collecte.
- Aver obtenu un certificat de fréquence à un cours spécifique en vêtements sera considéré comme un plus.
- Soins au détail, flexibilité et sensibilité au produit

Ce que nous offrons

- Se joindre à notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la recherche de l'excellence.
- Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de notre peuple, en favorisant leur développement professionnel.
- Le Groupe Prada favorise un environnement de travail inclusif, assurant des chances égales à tous les candidats, indépendamment du sexe, de l'origine ethnique, de l'orientation sexuelle, du handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles.
Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous nous engageons à créer un environnement de travail juste et respectueux pour tous.

jobs.title: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz

titleByLocale.it: Store Manager MIU MIU Saint Moritz
titleByLocale.en: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz
titleByLocale.de: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz
titleByLocale.fr: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As the Brand Store Manager, you are a passionate Brand Ambassador and a business leader, who conveys the Brand philosophy and values to the local market, the Store team and to the final Client. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 Leading the Business 

 
 

• Drive Store Team to exceed Financial targets and maximize sales performances, determining the success of the entire store 
 

• Propose and develop action plans, through careful analysis of performance 
 

• Drive the Store team to exceed their KPI targets, including cross selling and up selling among product categories 

 
 
 
 Client Development 

 
 

• Place the Client above all, leading by example to create a welcoming environment and to ensure the Team strives to meet their every need and request 
 

• Foster a Client centric mindset developing and maintaining solid Client relationships and enforcing meaningful after sales experiences 
 

• Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service through the execution of the “Brand Selling Ceremony” 
 
 
 

 
 Team Management 

 
 

• Act as a strong Staff motivator, promoting team spırıt through effective communication, and cultivating a positive and energetic environment, even to the eyes of the Client 
 

• Encourage the exchange of information within the team and proactively develop morning briefing on specific topics 
 

• Master fully all company tools and applications including IT and digital, and ensure team is constantly informed of relevant updates 
 

• Understand the needs and priorities, train and inspire the Store team on product knowledge, sales techniques, Client Services, and Company policies and procedures 
 
 
 

 
 Boutique Care 

 
 

• Lead by example to ensure the Team operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Product, evident in every ceremony or procedure 
 

• Ensure display attracts Clients and maximizes sales, in accordance with Company guidelines – proactively seek VM and MD support based on store needs 
 

• Provıde feedback and suggestions when necessary to the Visual Merchandising and the Retail Merchandising departments 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 
 

 
 At least 8 years of experience 

 
 Strong problem-solving and organizational skills 

 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities and coordinate across functions 

 
 Excellent communication skills and team spirit 

 
 Fluency in both Italian and English 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: PRADA Store Manager, Zurich
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Church’s and Car Shoe brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 To be the owner of the business, a Company Brand Ambassador and a business leader, accountable for overall store performance. To guarantee an extraordinary Client experience, being present on the sales floor, leading and supporting all activities to achieve store targets. 

 
 To manage and coach the store team and to ensure succession plans and internal growth. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 BUSINESS 

 
 

• Drive and maximize sales performances. 
 

• Propose and develop business plans. 
 

• Drive the store team to exceed their KPIs. 
 

• Represent the Company on the local market, identifying new opportunities to increase customer footfall, attracts new Clients and builds a loyal relationship with the brand. 
 

• Be present on the sales floor, ensuring a proper approach and service to the Clients. 
 

• Foster the Omni Channel development through the team. 
 

• Meet the store-operating budget, controlling store expenses. 
 
 
 

 
 CUSTOMER 

 
 

• Foster a Client centric mindset by developing and maintaining solid Client relationships. 
 

• Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service. 
 

• Implement, in partnership with other company functions, clienteling initiatives and events, securing Client loyalty and increasing Client spending. 
 

• Foster a strong private appointment culture. 
 
 
 

 
 TEAM 

 
 

• Promote an entrepreneurial and team spirit using effective communication, ensuring efficient organization and professional growth. 
 

• Ensure the team is always prepared and updated on the Prada Group main information, product knowledge, local market, competitors, policies and procedures. 
 

• The ideal Store Manager is able to attract and recruit the best talents available on the market through networking and scouting. 
 
 
 

 
 RETAIL 

 
 

• Develop a proper sales strategy, in cooperation with the Retail Merchandising, Visual Merchandising and Retail Operations teams. 
 

• Ensures that the display attracts Clients and maximizes sales in accordance with Company guidelines. 
 

• Participate in the buying session when requested and in any case he/she provides effective product feedback based on store needs. 
 

• Ensure synergy and cooperation between front and back of house. 
 

• Is responsible for the enforcement of Company procedures on cash activity, inventory, logistics and all the main reporting activities requested by the head office. 
 
 
 

 
 EVENTS 

 
 

• Cooperate with the Retail Events Office for the organization of local events and defines a challenging and realistic target per Client, proposing new opportunities for local events in partnership with local Stakeholders and Influencers. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Business driven 

 
 Leadership and team management 

 
 Ability to motivate and persuade people 

 
 Strong customer service mindset 

 
 Natural ability to welcome our client 

 
 Confident, enthusiastic and positive 

 
 Mature and assertive 

 
 Organized and detail oriented 

 
 Market and product knowledge/passion 

 
 Business/Retail Management degree or equivalent is a plus 

 
 Interest in luxury/fashion, art and design 

 
 Fluent spoken English expected. Other languages are desirable 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Store Manager - Italia Mansioni - Affari - Guidare e massimizzare le prestazioni di vendita. - Proporre e sviluppare piani di business. - Guida il team del negozio per superare i loro KPI. - Rappresentare la Società sul mercato locale, identificare nuove opportunità per aumentare la caduta dei clienti, attrarre nuovi clienti, e costruire un rapporto leale con il marchio. - Essere presente al piano di vendita, assicurando un corretto approccio e servizio ai Clienti. - Promuovere lo sviluppo di Omni Channel attraverso la squadra. - Incontra il budget operativo del negozio, controllando le spese del negozio. - Cliente - Promuovere una mentalità orientata al cliente sviluppando e mantenendo solide relazioni con il cliente. - Garantire un'eccellente soddisfazione del cliente e il più alto livello di servizio al cliente. - Implementazione, in collaborazione con altre funzioni aziendali, iniziative di clientela ed eventi, assicurando la lealtà del Cliente e aumentando la spesa del Cliente. - Promuovere una forte cultura di appuntamenti privati. - Squadra - Promuovere uno spirito imprenditoriale e di squadra utilizzando una comunicazione efficace, garantendo un'organizzazione efficiente e una crescita professionale. - Assicurarsi che il team sia sempre preparato e aggiornato sulle principali informazioni del Gruppo Prada, conoscenza dei prodotti, mercato locale, concorrenti, politiche e procedure. - L'ideale Store Manager è in grado di attrarre e reclutare i migliori talenti disponibili sul mercato attraverso networking e scouting. - Vendita al dettaglio - Sviluppare una corretta strategia di vendita, in collaborazione con i team Retail Merchandising, Visual Merchandising e Retail Operations. - Assicura che il display attiri i Clienti e massimizzi le vendite secondo le linee guida della Società. - Partecipa alla sessione di acquisto quando richiesto e in ogni caso, fornisce un feedback efficace dei prodotti in base alle esigenze del negozio. - Assicurare sinergia e collaborazione tra fronte e retro di casa. - È responsabile per l'esecuzione delle procedure aziendali in materia di attività in denaro, inventario, logistica e tutte le principali attività di reporting richieste dalla sede centrale. - Eventi - Cooperare con l'Ufficio eventi al dettaglio per l'organizzazione di eventi locali e definire un obiettivo impegnativo e realistico per cliente, proponendo nuove opportunità per eventi locali in collaborazione con Stakeholders e Influencers locali.
• Requisiti - Conoscenza e competenze - Business guidato - Leadership e gestione del team - Capacità di motivare e convincere le persone - Forte servizio clienti mindset - Capacità naturale di accogliere il nostro cliente - Confidente, entusiasta e positivo - Matura e assertiva - Organizzata e orientata al dettaglio - Conoscenze di mercato e di prodotto/passione - Business/Retail Management Grado o equivalente è un plus - Interessi di lusso/fashion, arte e design - Si aspettava l'inglese fluente. Altre lingue sono auspicabili Cosa? - Lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivati dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca di eccellenza. - Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che mettiamo sul talento e sulla passione della nostra gente che porta alla propria crescita professionale. - Prada Group promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità per tutti i candidati, indipendentemente dal sesso, dall'etnia, dall'orientamento sessuale, dalla disabilità o da altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un posto di lavoro giusto e rispettoso per tutti. Contatto [Inserisci informazioni di contatto qui]
descriptionByLocale.en:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Church’s and Car Shoe brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE To be the owner of the business, a Company Brand Ambassador and a business leader, accountable for overall store performance. To guarantee an extraordinary Client experience, being present on the sales floor, leading and supporting all activities to achieve store targets. To manage and coach the store team and to ensure succession plans and internal growth. RESPONSIBILITIES BUSINESS
• Drive and maximize sales performances.
• Propose and develop business plans.
• Drive the store team to exceed their KPIs.
• Represent the Company on the local market, identifying new opportunities to increase customer footfall, attracts new Clients and builds a loyal relationship with the brand.
• Be present on the sales floor, ensuring a proper approach and service to the Clients.
• Foster the Omni Channel development through the team.
• Meet the store-operating budget, controlling store expenses. CUSTOMER
• Foster a Client centric mindset by developing and maintaining solid Client relationships.
• Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service.
• Implement, in partnership with other company functions, clienteling initiatives and events, securing Client loyalty and increasing Client spending.
• Foster a strong private appointment culture. TEAM
• Promote an entrepreneurial and team spirit using effective communication, ensuring efficient organization and professional growth.
• Ensure the team is always prepared and updated on the Prada Group main information, product knowledge, local market, competitors, policies and procedures.
• The ideal Store Manager is able to attract and recruit the best talents available on the market through networking and scouting. RETAIL
• Develop a proper sales strategy, in cooperation with the Retail Merchandising, Visual Merchandising and Retail Operations teams.
• Ensures that the display attracts Clients and maximizes sales in accordance with Company guidelines.
• Participate in the buying session when requested and in any case he/she provides effective product feedback based on store needs.
• Ensure synergy and cooperation between front and back of house.
• Is responsible for the enforcement of Company procedures on cash activity, inventory, logistics and all the main reporting activities requested by the head office. EVENTS
• Cooperate with the Retail Events Office for the organization of local events and defines a challenging and realistic target per Client, proposing new opportunities for local events in partnership with local Stakeholders and Influencers. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Business driven Leadership and team management Ability to motivate and persuade people Strong customer service mindset Natural ability to welcome our client Confident, enthusiastic and positive Mature and assertive Organized and detail oriented Market and product knowledge/passion Business/Retail Management degree or equivalent is a plus Interest in luxury/fashion, art and design Fluent spoken English expected. Other languages are desirable Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Store Manager - Italien Mansion - Business - Fahren Sie und maximieren Sie die Verkaufsleistungen. - Ersetzen und entwickeln Geschäftspläne. - Fahren Sie das Ladenteam, um ihre KPIs zu übertreffen. - Repräsentieren Sie das Unternehmen auf dem lokalen Markt, identifizieren Sie neue Möglichkeiten, um den Kunden Fußfall zu erhöhen, neue Kunden anzuziehen und eine loyale Beziehung zur Marke aufzubauen. - Seien Sie auf der Verkaufsfläche anwesend, um einen richtigen Ansatz und Service für die Kunden zu gewährleisten. - Foster die Omni Channel-Entwicklung durch das Team. - Treffen Sie den geschäftsführenden Haushalt, kontrollieren Sie die Lagerkosten. - Kunde - Foster eine Client-zentrierte Denkweise durch die Entwicklung und Aufrechterhaltung solider Kundenbeziehungen. - Gewährleistung einer exzellenten Kundenzufriedenheit und dem höchsten Kundendienst. - Implementieren Sie in Partnerschaft mit anderen Unternehmensfunktionen, Kundeninitiativen und Events, sichern Sie die Kundenbindung und erhöhen Sie die Kundenausgaben. - Eine starke private Terminkultur. - Team - Förderung eines Unternehmer- und Teamgeistes durch effektive Kommunikation, Gewährleistung einer effizienten Organisation und professionelles Wachstum. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass das Team immer auf der Prada Group Hauptinformationen, Produktkenntnisse, lokalen Markt, Wettbewerber, Richtlinien und Verfahren vorbereitet und aktualisiert wird. - Der ideale Store Manager ist in der Lage, die besten Talente auf dem Markt durch Vernetzung und Scouting zu gewinnen und zu rekrutieren. - Einzelhandel - Entwicklung einer richtigen Vertriebsstrategie in Zusammenarbeit mit den Teams Retail Merchandising, Visual Merchandising und Retail Operations. - Vergewissern Sie sich, dass das Display Kunden anzieht und den Verkauf gemäß den Richtlinien des Unternehmens maximiert. - Beteiligen Sie sich an der Kaufsitzung, wenn gewünscht und in jedem Fall, er/sie bietet effektives Produkt-Feedback basierend auf den Speicherbedürfnissen. - Vergewissern Sie sich Synergie und Zusammenarbeit zwischen Haus und Haus. - ist verantwortlich für die Durchsetzung von Verfahren des Unternehmens in Bezug auf Cash-Aktivität, Inventar, Logistik und alle von der Zentrale angeforderten Hauptberichterstattungsaktivitäten. - Veranstaltungen - Zusammenarbeit mit dem Retail Events Office für die Organisation von lokalen Veranstaltungen und definiert ein herausforderndes und realistisches Ziel pro Client und schlägt neue Möglichkeiten für lokale Veranstaltungen in Partnerschaft mit lokalen Stakeholdern und Influencers vor. Voraussetzungen - Wissen und Fähigkeiten - Geschäftsgetrieben - Führung und Teammanagement - Fähigkeit, Menschen zu motivieren und zu überzeugen - Starker Kundendienst Mindset - Natürliche Möglichkeit, unseren Kunden zu begrüßen - Vertraut, begeistert und positiv - Reife und Durchsetzung - Organisiert und detailorientiert - Markt- und Produktwissen/Passion - Business/Retail Management Grad oder gleichwertig ist ein Plus - Interesse an Luxus, Kunst und Design - Fluent gesprochen Englisch erwartet. Andere Sprachen sind wünschenswert
• Cosa offriamo - Arbeiten in einem kreativen und internationalen Umfeld, mit Teams von Menschen motiviert durch Neugier und die Suche nach Exzellenz. - Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und Wert, die wir auf das Talent und die Leidenschaft unserer Menschen setzen, die zu ihrem eigenen beruflichen Wachstum führen. - Die Prada Group fördert ein inklusives Arbeitsumfeld, um Chancengleichheit für alle Kandidaten zu gewährleisten, unabhängig von Geschlecht, ethnischer Zugehörigkeit, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen. Wir glauben, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist, und wir sind verpflichtet, einen fairen und respektvollen Arbeitsplatz für alle zu schaffen. Contattoo [Kontaktinformationen hier einfügen]
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Store Manager - Italie Mansioni - Affaires - Conduire et maximiser les performances de vente. - Proposer et élaborer des plans d'affaires. - Conduisez l'équipe de magasin pour dépasser leurs KPI. - Représenter la Société sur le marché local, identifier de nouvelles opportunités pour augmenter le pas des clients, attirer de nouveaux clients, et construire une relation loyale avec la marque. - Être présent sur le plancher de vente, assurant une approche et un service appropriés aux clients. - Favoriser le développement du canal Omni à travers l'équipe. - Respecter le budget d'exploitation du magasin, contrôler les dépenses du magasin. - Client - Favoriser une mentalité centrée sur le client en développant et en maintenant des relations solides avec le client. - Garantir une excellente satisfaction du client et le plus haut niveau de service client. - Mettre en oeuvre, en partenariat avec d'autres fonctions de l'entreprise, des initiatives et des événements clients, en assurant la loyauté des clients et en augmentant les dépenses des clients. - Favoriser une forte culture de rendez-vous privé. - Équipe - Promouvoir un esprit d'entreprise et d'équipe en utilisant une communication efficace, en assurant une organisation efficace et une croissance professionnelle. - S'assurer que l'équipe est toujours préparée et mise à jour sur les principales informations, connaissances des produits, marché local, concurrents, politiques et procédures du groupe Prada. - L'idéal Store Manager est capable d'attirer et de recruter les meilleurs talents disponibles sur le marché grâce à la mise en réseau et au scoutisme. - Commerce de détail - Élaborer une stratégie de vente appropriée, en collaboration avec les équipes de vente au détail, de vente au détail et de vente au détail. - S'assure que l'écran attire les clients et maximise les ventes conformément aux lignes directrices de l'entreprise. - Participer à la séance d'achat sur demande et en tout cas, il fournit une rétroaction efficace sur les produits en fonction des besoins des magasins. - Assurer la synergie et la coopération entre le devant et l'arrière de la maison. - est responsable de l'application des procédures de l'entreprise concernant les activités en espèces, les stocks, la logistique et toutes les principales activités de déclaration demandées par le siège social. - Événements - Coopérer avec le Retail Events Office pour l'organisation d'événements locaux et définir une cible difficile et réaliste par client, en proposant de nouvelles possibilités d'événements locaux en partenariat avec les intervenants et les influenceurs locaux.
• Requisiti - Connaissances et compétences - Entreprise - Leadership et gestion d'équipe - Capacité de motiver et de persuader les gens - Un état d'esprit fort du service à la clientèle - Capacité naturelle d'accueillir notre client - Confiance, enthousiasme et positif - Mûr et affirmé - Organisé et axé sur les détails - Connaissance du marché et des produits/passion - Degré de gestion des affaires/de détail ou équivalent est un plus - Intérêt pour le luxe/fashion, l'art et le design - L'anglais couramment parlé est attendu. D'autres langues sont souhaitables
• Cosa offriamo - Travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la recherche de l'excellence. - Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de nos gens qui mènent à leur propre croissance professionnelle. - Le Groupe Prada favorise un environnement de travail inclusif, assurant l'égalité des chances à tous les candidats, indépendamment du sexe, de l'origine ethnique, de l'orientation sexuelle, du handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous sommes déterminés à bâtir un milieu de travail juste et respectueux pour tous. Contatto [Insérer les coordonnées ici]
